hooks.command: staged=$(git diff --cached --name-only 2>/dev/null); has_claude=$(printf '%s\n' "$staged" | grep -c '^CLAUDE\.md$'); has_readme=$(printf '%s\n' "$staged" | grep -c '^README\.md$'); if [ "$has_claude" -gt 0 ] && [ "$has_readme" -eq 0 ]; then printf '%s' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"CLAUDE.md is staged but README.md is not. Per the project convention in CLAUDE.md (Conventions section), re-read README.md and update it to match CLAUDE.md before committing. If README.md is already in sync, stage it anyway to confirm."}}'; fi

upstream=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref '@{u}' 2>/dev/null); if [ -z "$upstream" ]; then exit 0; fi; files=$(git log --name-only --pretty=format: "$upstream..HEAD" 2>/dev/null); has_claude=$(printf '%s\n' "$files" | grep -c '^CLAUDE\.md$'); has_readme=$(printf '%s\n' "$files" | grep -c '^README\.md$'); if [ "$has_claude" -gt 0 ] && [ "$has_readme" -eq 0 ]; then printf '%s' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Commits being pushed touch CLAUDE.md but never update README.md. Per project convention, re-read README.md and amend (or add a new commit) to keep it in sync before pushing."}}'; fi
